name: performance-testing-platform
description: Performance testing platform — k6 load/stress/spike/smoke testing with Grafana + InfluxDB

scripts.jmeter:smoke: mkdir -p results reports && rm -rf reports/jmeter-smoke results/jmeter-smoke.jtl && jmeter -n -t tests/jmeter/smoke.jmx -q tests/jmeter/config/smoke.properties -Jport=${PORT:-3000} -Jbase_url=${HOST:-localhost} -l results/jmeter-smoke.jtl -e -o reports/jmeter-smoke
scripts.jmeter:load: mkdir -p results reports && rm -rf reports/jmeter-load results/jmeter-load.jtl && jmeter -n -t tests/jmeter/load.jmx -q tests/jmeter/config/load.properties -Jport=${PORT:-3000} -Jbase_url=${HOST:-localhost} -l results/jmeter-load.jtl -e -o reports/jmeter-load
scripts.jmeter:stress: mkdir -p results reports && rm -rf reports/jmeter-stress results/jmeter-stress.jtl && jmeter -n -t tests/jmeter/stress.jmx -q tests/jmeter/config/stress.properties -Jport=${PORT:-3000} -Jbase_url=${HOST:-localhost} -l results/jmeter-stress.jtl -e -o reports/jmeter-stress
scripts.jmeter:spike: mkdir -p results reports && rm -rf reports/jmeter-spike results/jmeter-spike.jtl && jmeter -n -t tests/jmeter/spike.jmx -q tests/jmeter/config/spike.properties -Jport=${PORT:-3000} -Jbase_url=${HOST:-localhost} -l results/jmeter-spike.jtl -e -o reports/jmeter-spike
